task_completion.description: Open Fiji and launch the Grid/Collection Stitching plugin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fiji application window is open, and the 'Grid/Collection Stitching' dialog box is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the stitching grid, overlap, and input directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The stitching dialog shows Grid size x: 3, y: 3, overlap set to ~15%, and the input directory pointing to '~/Fiji_Data/raw/tiles' (or the absolute path).

task_completion.description: Execute the stitching process to generate the fused panorama
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new image window titled 'Fused' (or similar) containing the stitched panorama of fluorescent cells is visible within the Fiji workspace.

task_completion.description: Save the stitched panorama as a TIFF file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file explorer showing the file being saved as 'stitched_panorama.tif' in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/stitched/' directory.

task_completion.description: Save the stitched panorama as a PNG file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file explorer showing the file being saved as 'stitched_panorama.png' in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/stitched/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji GUI to perform the stitching
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Fiji application and the Stitching plugin dialogs, rather than terminal commands (like ImageMagick or Python scripts) bypassing the GUI.

integrity.description: The output image is a genuinely stitched panorama
integrity.visual_evidence: The fused image should look like a complete, seamless image of fluorescent cells (approx 512x512 pixels), not a single unstitched tile or a blank canvas.

integrity.description: The agent saved the outputs from the Fiji application
integrity.visual_evidence: The save actions should originate from Fiji's 'File > Save As' menus for the newly fused image, rather than just copying or renaming files in a terminal or file manager.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input tiles are located in '/home/ga/Fiji_Data/raw/tiles'. The grid parameters are 3x3 with 15% overlap. The output files must be saved to '/home/ga/Fiji_Data/results/stitched/stitched_panorama.tif' and '/home/ga/Fiji_Data/results/stitched/stitched_panorama.png'. Note: The final stitched image will be approximately 512x512 pixels in size showing fluorescent cells.
